entry.value:
[["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","a|0|1|2|3|4|5","6c2a9955-a2a0-4a1f-8fa8-61b2b79dc7d6","o|","auto","b|F","a|","a|7","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|D|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","SQL Project Information Agent Plan
","2026-03-17T04:41:36.314Z","2026-03-17T05:52:31.647Z","claude-sonnet-4-6","isAgentConversation","a|X","b|T","o|Y|Z","n|0","924685ba-52ec-4dcb-b822-be720ee75232","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|d|e|f|g|h|i|j","c1487e87-fc85-467d-b2e0-2b934a252f30","8da949d8-8a07-4774-adcf-feba723b07d0","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VE62pk2","seen","o|k|l|m|n|o|b|p|q","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|f|s|t|u|g|j","exchange-pointer","4f19e001-25c1-4dce-8440-f0f2bc7a4d99","2026-03-17T04:42:59.346Z","# 需求：做项目信息问答的智能体，你帮我分析并给出合理的方案

我打算做一个智能体，给这个智能体输入某某项目的某方面的情况，智能体输出关于这个项目对应的信息。 我打算让这个智能体直接读取数据库，这个智能体通过sql语句去查询，然后通过大模型给我输出结果，这个方案可行吗？如何做？如果这样做，我需要先准备好什么？你帮我分析并给出合理的方案

## 用户提问及智能体输出的示例如下

问：XX项目开票情况怎么样？

输出：项目简称：，项目类型：，客户名称： ，项目状态： ，项目经理： ，合同金额： ，除税报价：，是否结算：，已开票金额合计：取已开票金额合计1字段内容，未开票金额合计：。

 

问：XX项目回款情况怎么样？

输出：项目简称：，项目类型：，客户名称： ，项目状态： ，项目经理： ，合同金额： ，除税报价：，是否结算：，已收货币资金：，已收房抵款金额：，已收其他金额：，已收款金额合计：取已收款金额合计1字段内容，未收款金额合计：。

 

问：XX项目成本情况怎么样？

输出：项目简称：，项目类型：，客户名称： ，项目状态： ，项目经理： ，合同金额： ，除税报价：，是否结算：，项目已付成本：取项目成本已用金额字段内容，应付账款：，项目成本合计：取项目成本小计字段内容。

## sql server数据库信息：

```
主机：39.96.202.90
端口：42679
用户名：sa
密码：Cg3k294%
数据库：A8V71
```

## 凡高与文森特项目的表结构信息：

1、凡高项目主表结构：A8V71.dbo.formmain_0040

~~~sql
-- auto-generated definition
create table formmain_0040
(
 ID numeric(19) not null
 primary key comment '主键ID',
 state int comment '流程状态',
 start_member_id varchar(25) comment '发起人ID',
 start_date datetime comment '发起时间',
 approve_member_id varchar(25) comment '审批人ID',
 approve_date datetime comment '审批时间',
 finishedflag int comment '归档标志',
 ratifyflag int comment '批准标志',
 ratify_member_id varchar(25) comment '批准人ID',
 ratify_date datetime comment '批准时间',
 sort int comment '排序号',
 modify_member_id varchar(25) comment '修改人ID',
 modify_date datetime comment '修改时间',
 field0001 nvarchar(100) comment '项目ID',
 field0004 nvarchar(100) comment '项目地址',
 field0005 nvarchar(100) comment '客户名称',
 field0006 nvarchar(100) comment '客户编码',
 field0007 nvarchar(100) comment '客户联系人',
 field0008 nvarchar(100) comment '客户联系电话',
 field0011 nvarchar(20) comment '项目状态',
 field0013 nvarchar(100) comment '项目规模',
 field0015 nvarchar(100) comment '建设方',
 field0017 numeric(20, 2) comment '预估价',
 field0019 datetime comment '实际开工日期',
 field0020 datetime comment '竣工时间',
 field0022 datetime comment '立项时间',
 field0024 nvarchar(20) comment '申请人',
 field0025 nvarchar(20) comment '项目经理',
 field0026 nvarchar(20) comment '技术负责人',
 field0028 datetime comment '申请时间',
 field0030 nvarchar(20) comment '施工员',
 field0031 nvarchar(20) comment '安全员',
 field0032 nvarchar(20) comment '质量员',
 field0033 nvarchar(20) comment '材料员',
 field0034 nvarchar(20) comment '资料员',
 field0035 nvarchar(20) comment '预算员',
 field0036 nvarchar(20) comment '标准员',
 field0037 nvarchar(20) comment '深化设计师',
 field0039 nvarchar(100) comment '立项申请单流程',
 field0043 nvarchar(20) comment '财务部共享',
 field0045 nvarchar(20) comment '项目类型',
 field0046 nvarchar(100) comment '项目简称',
 field0048 numeric(20, 2) comment '项目成本控制总额',
 field0049 numeric(20, 2) comment '项目成本已用金额',
 field0050 numeric(20, 2) comment '项目成本控制可用金额',
 field0052 numeric(20, 2) comment '合同金额',
 field0053 numeric(20, 2) comment '除税报价',
 field0054 numeric(20, 2) comment '税金',
 field0055 numeric(20, 2) comment '人工成本目标',
 field0056 numeric(20, 2) comment '材料成本目标',
 field0065 datetime comment '系统时间',
 field0067 numeric(20) comment '距离本项目竣工天数',
 field0069 numeric(20, 2) comment '措施费成本目标',
 field0070 nvarchar(255) comment '备注',
 field0072 nvarchar(20) comment '进度计划表',
 field0073 nvarchar(20) comment '劳动力计划表',
 field0074 nvarchar(20) comment '材料计划表',
 field0076 nvarchar(5) comment '合格',
 field0077 nvarchar(5) comment '一次性验收通过',
 field0078 nvarchar(5) comment '交付率',
 field0079 numeric(20) comment '交付率1',
 field0080 nvarchar(5) comment '省奖',
 field0081 nvarchar(5) comment '国奖',
 field0082 nvarchar(5) comment '第三方评测分数',
 field0084 nvarchar(5) comment '0伤亡',
 field0085 nvarchar(5) comment '零投诉',
 field0087 nvarchar(20) comment '策划分析',
 field0088 nvarchar(20) comment '图纸内部会审',
 field0089 nvarchar(20) comment '会议记录',
 field0090 nvarchar(100) comment '项目启动审批',
 field0092 nvarchar(100) comment '成本控制审批',
 field0094 nvarchar(20) comment '设备进场计划',
 field0095 nvarchar(20) comment '分包模式及劳务需求',
 field0096 nvarchar(20) comment '办公设施及布置',
 field0097 nvarchar(20) comment '劳动保护设施',
 field0099 nvarchar(20) comment '询价流程',
 field0100 nvarchar(255) comment '询价流程说明',
 field0101 nvarchar(20) comment '回价审价流程',
 field0102 nvarchar(255) comment '回价审价流程说明',
 field0103 nvarchar(20) comment '定价流程',
 field0104 nvarchar(255) comment '定价流程说明',
 field0105 nvarchar(100) comment '采购专项流程',
 field0107 nvarchar(20) comment '客户来源',
 field0108 nvarchar(100) comment '介绍人',
 field0109 nvarchar(5) comment '办公',

 field0114 nvarchar(5) comment '会所',
 field0115 nvarchar(5) comment '软装',
 field0119 datetime comment '开标时间',
 field0120 nvarchar(20) comment '开标结果',
 field0121 nvarchar(100) comment '设计周期',
 field0123 datetime comment '设计周期开始',
 field0124 datetime comment '设计周期截止',

 field0151 numeric(20, 2) comment '已开票金额合计',
 field0154 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收款金额合计',

 field0165 numeric(20, 2) comment '平米经济指标',
 field0167 numeric(20, 2) comment '结算值',
 field0169 datetime comment '质保金到期时间',
 field0170 numeric(20, 2) comment '质保金额',

 field0174 nvarchar(20) comment '施工图设计师',

 field0193 numeric(20) comment '设计周期日',
 field0195 nvarchar(20) comment '票据类型',
 field0196 nvarchar(20) comment '合同附件',
 field0083 nvarchar(100) comment '第三方评测分数1',
 field0198 nvarchar(20) comment '税率',
 field0200 nvarchar(20) comment '设计项目税率',
 field0202 nvarchar(4000) comment '主案设计师1',
 field0203 nvarchar(4000) comment '效果图设计师1',
 field0204 nvarchar(4000) comment '施工图设计师1',
 field0205 nvarchar(4000) comment '设计助理1',
 field0207 numeric(20, 2) comment '未开票金额合计',
 field0209 numeric(20) comment '年份计算',
 field0211 numeric(20) comment '设计年份计算',
 field0213 numeric(20, 2) comment '未收款金额合计',
 field0217 nvarchar(100) comment '序号1',
 field0219 numeric(20) comment '序号2',
 field0232 numeric(20, 2) comment '本次收款金额合计',
 field0234 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收管理费',
 field0180 numeric(23, 4) comment '管理费收费比例',
 field0236 numeric(20, 2) comment '完工进度',
 field0238 nvarchar(500) comment '项目备注',
 field0240 numeric(20, 2) comment '完工进度计算',
 field0242 nvarchar(20) comment '是否结算',
 field0244 numeric(20, 2) comment '应付账款',
 field0245 numeric(20, 2) comment '项目成本小计',
 field0246 numeric(20, 2) comment '项目利润',
 field0248 numeric(20, 4) comment '目标利润率',
 field0250 numeric(20, 4) comment '已收款比例',
 field0252 numeric(20, 4) comment '项目利润率',
 field0254 numeric(20, 2) comment '欠发票金额',
 field0256 numeric(20, 2) comment '未收款金额',
 field0233 numeric(22, 4) comment '本次收款比例合计',
 field0258 numeric(20, 2) comment '管理费剩余待收金额',
 field0260 numeric(20, 2) comment '历史收入金额',
 field0261 numeric(20, 2) comment '历史开票金额',
 field0263 numeric(20, 2) comment '已开票金额合计1',
 field0264 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收款金额合计1',
 field0265 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收货币资金',
 field0266 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收房抵款金额',
 field0267 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收其他金额',
 field0268 nvarchar(5),
 field0269 nvarchar(5)
)
 comment '凡高项目主表';
go

create index idx_sort
 on formmain_0040 (sort);
go

create index idx_field0001
 on formmain_0040 (field0001);
go

create index idx_field0219
 on formmain_0040 (field0219);
go
~~~

 field0270 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收货币资金',
 field0271 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收房抵款金额',
 field0272 numeric(20, 2) comment '已收其他金额'
)
 comment '文森特项目主表';
go

create index idx_sort
 on formmain_0163 (sort);
go

create index idx_field0001
 on formmain_0163 (field0001);
go

create index idx_field0218
 on formmain_0163 (field0218);
go
~~~

","o|v|w|x|y|z|o|q","7ff5634c-fe64-48ea-a968-92699d0c3232","2026-03-17T04:43:06.052Z","","o|v|w|11|12|13|o|q","7dfd4523-dc62-40b0-aaa2-417ad8111c9f","2026-03-17T04:43:27.134Z","o|v|w|15|16|13|o|q","6f652a23-c1ab-4906-9ca4-1e5ecb786751","2026-03-17T04:56:03.132Z","问题1：LIKE 模糊匹配就可以
问题2：如果搜索"万科"匹配到3个项目，让用户选择
问题3：需要两张表都搜
问题4：示例如下
ARK_API_KEY：96264abb-e1e5-47f6-9936-885276e08ed1

from openai import OpenAI
import os

api_key = os.getenv('ARK_API_KEY')

client = OpenAI(
 base_url='https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3',
 api_key=api_key
)

tools = [{
 "type": "web_search",
 "max_keyword": 2,
}]

# 创建一个对话请求
response = client.responses.create(
 model="deepseek-v3-2-251201",
 input=[{"role": "user", "content": "北京的天气怎么样？"}],
 tools=tools,
)

print(response)","o|v|w|18|19|1A|o|q","8b7becfa-ec90-4c26-b4e2-31fb42727d3a","2026-03-17T04:56:27.286Z","o|v|w|1C|1D|13|o|q","f3e774aa-b9f6-4e49-a6a4-847785bdee4e","2026-03-17T04:56:36.460Z","o|v|w|1F|1G|13|o|q","c5efaeb7-6851-407e-820b-34ca7913769e","2026-03-17T04:56:40.540Z","o|v|w|1I|1J|13|o|q","937a677e-22f3-4679-a1cc-5d352f24e4a8","2026-03-17T04:56:47.904Z","o|v|w|1L|1M|13|o|q","22a4291b-a087-4339-b274-3070241e5a8d","2026-03-17T04:57:35.633Z","o|v|w|1O|1P|13|o|q","2cd14d91-950b-4957-95eb-4c7568547fa2","2026-03-17T04:57:43.492Z","o|v|w|1R|1S|13|o|q","fe518bbd-d143-4ca9-b6c3-54c0469a7e2a","2026-03-17T04:57:51.143Z","o|v|w|1U|1V|13|o|q","c7b7f64e-7095-46db-8063-0fdda06240bf","2026-03-17T04:57:59.049Z","o|v|w|1X|1Y|13|o|q","471734cf-a180-4876-bd9a-776a34a60db9","2026-03-17T04:58:07.535Z","o|v|w|1a|1b|13|o|q","5b82a33e-c32f-4b3c-84c2-76826bdfc07c","2026-03-17T04:58:12.512Z","o|v|w|1d|1e|13|o|q","33c40169-cdcb-4533-9be8-fd9c08182a64","2026-03-17T04:58:26.019Z","o|v|w|1g|1h|13|o|q","15a62d7a-33cf-4c5b-b2e8-01ab44ccbb29","2026-03-17T04:58:32.387Z","o|v|w|1j|1k|13|o|q","71419589-9c21-434a-b1ee-2b47d747ed6c","2026-03-17T04:58:43.619Z","o|v|w|1m|1n|13|o|q","2f0a1a94-166e-47d3-a686-6bb6de5df955","2026-03-17T04:58:48.911Z","o|v|w|1p|1q|13|o|q","0d759e20-a60e-46e3-bd69-1165e4691148","2026-03-17T04:59:02.022Z","o|v|w|1s|1t|13|o|q","00a2183a-a79c-4775-8015-b9332fd0bd59","2026-03-17T04:59:07.912Z","o|v|w|1v|1w|13|o|q","9cd9c6c0-f9c7-4180-9656-14e3e82db7d3","2026-03-17T04:59:19.022Z","o|v|w|1y|1z|13|o|q","84557add-8ee0-4cff-9e31-7e0c08ef9833","2026-03-17T04:59:24.075Z","o|v|w|21|22|13|o|q","81ff9e17-da46-4c09-be84-0028eed306c5","2026-03-17T04:59:46.010Z","o|v|w|24|25|13|o|q","4fc5b4c7-a6e9-4c81-ae49-7aaf734dcbc3","2026-03-17T04:59:52.148Z","o|v|w|27|28|13|o|q","c1eea466-36c8-4863-8907-4dd9f8e23646","2026-03-17T05:00:08.679Z","o|v|w|2A|2B|13|o|q","f679e5f4-ff6d-4736-8019-c2d491ae2e93","2026-03-17T05:00:15.353Z","o|v|w|2D|2E|13|o|q","6a58bc40-f2b6-426a-92f8-7475ec31a330","2026-03- bb-b442-d53d6a303028","2026-03-17T05:18:30.628Z","o|v|w|3P|3Q|13|o|q","d228bbba-7b69-4e23-87f6-5b291144ebdb","2026-03-17T05:18:35.906Z","o|v|w|3S|3T|13|o|q","7418f31b-acd9-4cbe-9990-4acab20d779e","2026-03-17T05:18:41.386Z","o|v|w|3V|3W|13|o|q","40d1aba8-26fb-4444-b2ba-d67b098f0c6a","2026-03-17T05:18:45.779Z","o|v|w|3Y|3Z|13|o|q","a402faf0-4649-45d7-9e74-00d6758aad0f","2026-03-17T05:18:50.759Z","o|v|w|3b|3c|13|o|q","45f20fa0-605e-4cd3-a5e7-672ca59bd9d6","2026-03-17T05:19:14.801Z","o|v|w|3e|3f|13|o|q","a4e8696d-5178-418e-9712-e6daf74710b8","2026-03-17T05:32:42.952Z","1、我这个 ARK API Key 应该是有效的
2、数据库服务器可以了","o|v|w|3h|3i|3j|o|q","794169c1-cbfa-4419-8928-62361c62bb71","2026-03-17T05:32:52.802Z","o|v|w|3l|3m|13|o|q","bc64bf8f-4cea-408c-ab70-3f32731da406","2026-03-17T05:33:03.222Z","o|v|w|3o|3p|13|o|q","4b7489cb-a80e-471f-bc11-dd1ab16caf1e","2026-03-17T05:35:02.027Z","我用了一个新的ARK_API_KEY=38a1538e-4033-441a-a66f-08563cd6e6a4，你再试一下","o|v|w|3r|3s|3t|o|q","3053c4e7-c5fa-443d-a185-4362168d4e4a","2026-03-17T05:35:10.583Z","o|v|w|3v|3w|13|o|q","59397d27-6896-4c92-b7d4-d692b5a0ca05","2026-03-17T05:35:20.357Z","o|v|w|3y|3z|13|o|q","960981c0-9aac-4830-9f8a-031bcc20e860","bf65c892-3663-4915-ad75-1a595f06e1b2","n|VE6GPWZ","o|k|41|42|n|o|3F|43|q","42375b05-a9f4-49a9-8571-db84a1673af9","2026-03-17T05:52:31.662Z","curl --location 'https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/responses' \
--header "Authorization: Bearer 38a1538e-4033-441a-a66f-08563cd6e6a4" \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
 "model": "deepseek-v3-2-251201",
 "stream": true,
 "tools": [
 {
 "type": "web_search",
 "max_keyword": 3
 }
 ],
 "input": [
 {
 "role": "user",
 "content": [
 {
 "type": "input_text",
 "text": "今天有什么热点新闻"
 }
 ]
 }
 ]
}'
